--- Page 2 ---
SELF-DECLARATION OF NON-BLACKLISTING 
 
 
We Jitendra Lakhotia Director are established and reputable hereby confirm that 
our company CHESSY KNOWLEDGE QUOTIENT PRIVATE LIMITED or 
its group company / subsidiary company / holding company /affiliate /associate 
company / partner should have never been black listed and/ or banned and /or 
barred and / or disqualified and or prohibited by any Government, Government 
Autonomous, Pvt. or any court of law and / or quasi-judicial authority / and or any 
other statutory and/ or regulatory authority, in undertaking any work directly or 
indirectly which is required to perform as stated in this BID and/ or issuance of any 
certificate of audit directly or indirectly with respect to the work sated herein the 
BID”. 
 
Yours faithfully, 
 
CHESSY KNOWLEDGE QUOTIENT PRIVATE LIMITED 
 
 
 
Thanking you, 
 
 
 
 
 
Jitendra Lakhotia  
Director 
Jitendra Lakhotia  
 
3RD FLOOR, ROOM NO.308, MARTIN BURN, 1 R. N. MUKHERJEE ROAD, LAL BAZAR, 
Kolkata, West Bengal-700 001, 
 
Ref: Bid No.  GEM/2026/B/7319588

--- Page 3 ---
Undertaking/Certificate warranty 
 
 
We CHESSY KNOWLEDGE QUOTIENT PRIVATE LIMITED, hereby undertake that- as 
warranty assured by us. It should reflected on OEMs website. 
 
Yours faithfully, 
 
 
Thanking you, 
 
 
 
 
 
Jitendra Lakhotia  
Director 
on date of supplay of all in one, quote only those products in the bid onsite  
Ref: Bid No.  GEM/2026/B/7319588

--- Page 4 ---
OPTION CLAUSE: 
 
The Purchaser reserves the right to increase or decrease the quantity to be ordered up 
to 25 percent of bid quantity at the time of placement of contract. The purchaser also 
reserves the right to increase the ordered quantity by up to 25% of the contracted quantity 
during the currency of the contract at the contracted rates. Bidders are bound to accept the 
orders accordingly. 
 
 
Thanking you, 
 
 
 
 
 
Jitendra Lakhotia  
Director 
Ref: Bid No.  GEM/2026/B/7319588

--- Page 5 ---
Undertaking Bidder financial standing 
This is to declare and confirm that our Company doesn't have / 
involved with any litigation, current or in the past, 
 
This is to declare and confirm that our Company doesn't have any work 
order/ contract that was abandoned at any stage or withdrawn from, 
pre maturely terminated or resulted inordinate delay. We have 
completed and executed all our Work Orders/ Contracts. 
 
This is to declare and confirm that our company doesn't involved with 
any proceedings for bankruptcy, insolvency or winding up. 
 
All above declarations and confirmations has been given as per 
requirement of Tender. 
 
Thanking you, 
 
 
 
 
 
Jitendra Lakhotia  
Director 
 
Ref: Bid No.  GEM/2026/B/7319588

--- Page 6 ---
Undertaking 
 
 
 
Non-disclosure of relevant information or furnishing of incorrect information, 
documents will attract dis 
qualification.  
 
 
Thanking you, 
 
 
 
 
 
Jitendra Lakhotia  
Director 
 
Ref: Bid No.  GEM/2026/B/7319588

--- Page 7 ---
DECLARATION FOR Submitting Completed Delivery and Installation 
 
 
 
This is to declare  and  confirm  that  wherever  required  for  End  User  Certificate  
from your Organization for Completed Delivery and Installation , same shall be 
provided in your Organization standard format only. 
All Above declarations and confirmations has been given as per requirement of 
Tender. 
 
 
 
 
Thanking you, 
 
 
 
 
 
Jitendra Lakhotia  
Director 
Ref: Bid No.  GEM/2026/B/7319588

--- Page 8 ---
Malicious Code Certificate 
 
The seller should upload following certificate in the bid:- 
 
(a) 
This is to certify that the Hardware and the Software being offered, as part 
of the contract, does not contain Embedded Malicious code that would activate 
procedures to :- 
(i) 
Inhibit the desires and designed function of the equipment. 
(ii) 
Cause physical damage to the user or equipment during the exploitation. 
(iii) Tap information resident or transient in the equipment/network. 
 
(b) 
The firm will be considered to be in breach of the procurement contract, 
in case physical damage, loss of information or infringements related to 
copyright and Intellectual Property Right (IPRs) are caused due to activation 
of any such malicious code in embedded software. 
 
Thanking you, 
 
 
 
 
 
Jitendra Lakhotia  
Director 
Ref: Bid No.  GEM/2026/B/7319588

--- Page 9 ---
DECLARATION FOR Registered Office in India to Provide after Sales 
Service. 
 
 
 
This is to declare and confirm that being Copy of address of Service 
Centre of OEM. Also has been attached herewith for your reference and record. 
 
And we as Authorized reseller of OEM have a registered office in India 
to provide after sales service support in India. 
 
Below is Our registered Office Address: 
 
CHESSY KNOWLEDGE QUOTIENT PRIVATE LIMITED  
 
Above declarations and confirmations has been given as per 
requirement of Tender. 
 
 
Thanking you, 
 
 
 
 
 
Jitendra Lakhotia  
Director 
 
 
3RD FLOOR, ROOM NO.308, MARTIN BURN, 1 R. N. 
MUKHERJEE ROAD, LAL BAZAR, Kolkata, West Bengal-700 001,
 
 
 
Ref: Bid No.  GEM/2026/B/7319588

--- Page 10 ---
Undertaking Land Border Sharing 
 
 
 
Dear Sir,  
 
 
I have read the clause of MoF circular No. F.No.6/18/2019-PPD dated 23.07.2020 regarding 
restriction on procurement from a bidder of a country which shares a land border with India;  
 
I certify that this bidder is not from such a country or, if from such a country, has been 
registered with the Competent Authority. I hereby certify that this bidder fulfils all 
requirements in this regard and is eligible to be considered. In case I fail to comply with the 
circular, 
 
my bid shall be liable to be rejected without assigning any further reason” [Where applicable, 
evidence of valid registration by the Competent Authority shall be attached.]  
 
 
 
 
 
 Thanking you, 
 
 
 
 
 
Jitendra Lakhotia  
Director 
 
Ref: Bid No.  GEM/2026/B/7319588
